name: Fish Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Speckled trout, redfish or red snapper fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place fish in a 9x12-inch baking dish.
2. Pour the creamy Italian salad dressing over the fish.
3. Drizzle the melted butter evenly over the fish.
4. Sprinkle the crumbled potato chips and Velveeta cheese slices on top of the fish.
5. Bake for 15 minutes in a preheated 350°F oven.
